## Related Issue
<!-- This project only accepts pull requests related to open issues. -->
<!-- Please open an issue for this change if one does not already exist. -->

## Description
<!-- In 1-3 sentences, provide an overview of what changes were made and why. -->

## Preparing Your Pull Request

Please follow these steps when preparing your pull request:

- [ ] [Create an issue][1] for the change, if one doesn't already exist

- [ ] Fork the repository and clone it to your computer

- [ ] Create an issue branch

- [ ] *(optional)* Open a pull request from your issue branch into `master`, to track your progress through this checklist. You will need to make some change to the code before you can open the pull request.

- [ ] Update the documentation (README, CONTRIBUTING, PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE) to reflect the changes you intend to make

- [ ] Make your changes to the code

- [ ] Update the documentation again, if needed

- [ ] Update your issue branch from the `master` branch

- [ ] Open a pull request from your issue branch into `master`, if you haven't already

- [ ] Address any changes requested by the reviewer

## Steps for Maintainers

These steps are for maintainers only:

- [ ] Squash and merge the pull request

- [ ] Delete the issue branch, if needed

- [ ] add changes to latest release draft, or create a new draft

[1]: https://github.com/digitallinguistics/tools/issues
